name: Dragon Ball (RPG)
description:
Hello everyone! This is past me, I have no idea how this bot turned out! I was planning to make this my most in depth bot but I'm very lazy so maybe not. If you have anything to say, say it in the comments. But don't say anything generic like the AI talks for you, that's not really in my control and is just the AI being a dumbass sometimes.

This bot is made for anyone who wants to have a good Dragon Ball RPG bot!

RIP Akira Toriyama, You will be missed as long as Dragon Ball fans live on.

Anyway yeah... That's all for me have fun!
creator: PoopySnoopy
